description_long: This is a tropical-style bungalow situated on a circular island base surrounded by water, featuring several thatched-roof structures interconnected by wooden walkways and docks. The main building is centrally located, with a large sloped roof and open sides, suggesting an airy, open-plan design. Several smaller huts and platforms extend over the water, connected by piers, and a cluster of palm trees provides shade and a lush, resort-like atmosphere. The construction appears to be primarily wood, with natural materials used for both the buildings and the walkways. The water and island base are stylized, giving the impression of a private retreat or vacation home. The overall scene evokes a sense of relaxation and leisure, typical of a luxury bungalow in a coastal or island setting.
description: A tropical bungalow complex with thatched roofs, wooden walkways, and palm trees on a circular island surrounded by water. The design is open, airy, and resort-like.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main bungalow, wooden docks, and palm trees clustered at the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large central roof, extended dock, and more visible water area.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the back of the main structure and dense palm tree coverage.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the approach to the main dock and the arrangement of smaller huts.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with open sides and scattered windows
